title: Freeze It, and Heat It!
description: A food temperature system as an addon for cold sweat.
body:
# Abstract
This mod is an addon for mod Cold Sweat. Foods in players' inventory or containers are easily getting frozen or rotten under cold or warm environments. Players have to use boiler and icebox to heat or freeze the foods to make it back to normal - otherwise, if players eat an abnormal food item, bad effects will happen to them.

# New Item
Food Pouch is added for players to store more foods and slow down the speed for rotting and freezing.

# Config
You can enable or disable rotting or freezing in config, and modify the speed of them. You can also add some whitelist to prevent some kinds of food from getting rotten or frozen.

# Other
This mod is made for modpack The Winter Frontier.

You should install Cold Sweat as the required dependency of this mod.
